## LibraryRuntime.IResolvedFillingOption type

A resolved filling option with the full recipe or ingredient object. Discriminated union for type-safe access.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IResolvedFillingOption = IResolvedRecipeFillingOption | IResolvedIngredientFillingOption;
```
